## QueryEnvelope Class

Immutable envelope carrying a query request to a projection actor\.

public record QueryEnvelope : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Queries.QueryEnvelope>

### Remarks
DAPR actor proxy uses [System\.Runtime\.Serialization\.DataContractSerializer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.runtime.serialization.datacontractserializer 'System\.Runtime\.Serialization\.DataContractSerializer') for method
parameters\. The data contract attributes are part of the public projection
adapter wire contract and must stay additive/backward\-compatible\.
